title: cymbopogon coloratus
intro: Cymbopogon coloratus, also known as East Indian lemon grass or lemongrass, is a tropical grass native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, thanks to its essential oil containing citral and limonene. The health benefits of Cymbopogon coloratus include reducing stress and anxiety, alleviating digestive issues, and acting as a natural insect repellent. Cymbopogon coloratus can be prepared as herbal teas, essential oils, or infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine and culinary practices.
